scenarios.name: OT/SCADA attack halting production and threatening operational safety
scenarios.technical_signal: A cyber attack targeting the SCADA historian and HMI workstations has disrupted process control visibility, forcing operators to manual fallback procedures and risking production line safety.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A cyber attack on the SCADA process control platform with production shutdown risk
recommended_actions: Initiate OT incident response and activate manual production fallback procedures immediately.
Isolate affected SCADA network segments and notify plant safety officers.
Engage OT security specialists for forensic integrity assessment of ICS systems.
Issue production continuity advisory to executive leadership with estimated restart timeline.

scenarios.name: Ransomware outbreak encrypting plant IT systems and threatening production
scenarios.technical_signal: Ransomware has encrypted MES and ERP servers, halting production scheduling and order management workflows across the plant.
scenarios.executive_trigger: Active ransomware encryption on production IT systems threatening manufacturing continuity
recommended_actions: Isolate encrypted systems from the OT network immediately to prevent spread to PLCs.
Activate manual production scheduling and paper-based order tracking as contingency.
Engage ransomware incident response retainer and notify executive leadership.
Assess backup integrity for MES and ERP and provide restoration ETA to operations.

scenarios.name: Supplier compromise disrupting raw material logistics
scenarios.technical_signal: A ransomware attack at a key raw material supplier has disrupted inbound logistics and EDI connectivity, threatening production line continuity.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A third-party ransomware event disrupting inbound supply chain logistics
recommended_actions: Suspend supplier EDI connectivity pending integrity confirmation.
Activate contingency sourcing plans and assess safety stock runway.
Notify production planning of material shortage risk and estimated impact window.
Issue supply chain advisory to COO and board with financial exposure estimate.

scenarios.name: Privileged identity compromise with lateral movement toward OT systems
scenarios.technical_signal: EDR and identity telemetry show suspicious activity from an OT administrator account following a phishing event, with lateral movement attempts detected toward the MES and plant control network.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A compromised OT administrator identity with lateral movement toward plant control systems
recommended_actions: Disable compromised OT accounts and revoke all active plant access sessions.
Isolate the remote access gateway and audit inbound connections from the previous 72 hours.
Notify plant operations management of potential production system integrity risk.
Brief COO and CISO on lateral movement scope and production continuity exposure.

scenarios.name: Remote plant access gateway zero-day threatening production network
scenarios.technical_signal: A critical vulnerability in the remote access gateway used for plant maintenance and vendor support has been identified with active exploitation reported, threatening the integrity of the OT/IT boundary.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A remotely exploitable vulnerability on the plant remote access gateway
recommended_actions: Patch or disable the remote access gateway within 24 hours.
Suspend all vendor remote access pending gateway integrity confirmation.
Review inbound connection logs for signs of prior exploitation.
Notify COO and plant management of potential OT network exposure.

scenarios.name: ERP database vulnerability threatening financial and production data
scenarios.technical_signal: A critical SQL Server or Active Directory vulnerability on the ERP backend threatens the integrity of financial records, production orders, and procurement data.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A critical database or directory vulnerability affecting the ERP platform
recommended_actions: Patch the affected ERP database or directory server on an emergency timeline.
Restrict privileged administrative access to the ERP tier during remediation.
Assess exposure of financial reporting and procurement workflows.

scenarios.name: PLM intellectual property exposure via cloud misconfiguration
scenarios.technical_signal: A cloud storage misconfiguration has exposed PLM design files, CAD drawings, or proprietary manufacturing process data to the public internet.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A cloud misconfiguration exposing proprietary engineering and product design data
recommended_actions: Remove public access to the engineering data repository immediately.
Audit access logs for signs of competitive intelligence extraction.
Notify engineering leadership and legal of potential IP exposure.
Assess contractual obligations with customers or partners for data protection.

scenarios.name: Core network device vulnerability threatening OT/IT connectivity
scenarios.technical_signal: A critical vulnerability in a core network device (router or switch) threatens the integrity of the OT/IT boundary and the connectivity of production plant systems.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A critical vulnerability on a core network device at the OT/IT boundary
recommended_actions: Apply vendor patch or isolate the affected network device from production traffic.
Audit network device configurations for signs of tampering.
Validate OT/IT segmentation boundaries remain intact.
Notify network operations and plant management of connectivity risk.

scenarios.name: API or application endpoint vulnerability exposing manufacturing systems
scenarios.technical_signal: A vulnerability in an API or application endpoint used by manufacturing or supply chain systems creates a path for unauthenticated access to operational data or system controls.
scenarios.executive_trigger: An API or application vulnerability exposing manufacturing or supply chain systems
recommended_actions: Apply vendor patch or disable the affected API endpoint until remediation is confirmed.
Audit API access logs for signs of unauthorised data access or enumeration.
Review internet exposure of affected manufacturing or supply chain APIs.
Notify supply chain and operations leadership of potential data exposure.
